## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is based on `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format (`feat: add thing`)
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` pass (for Rust changes)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` pass (for TS changes)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files are included
- [ ] I have added doc comments to new public Rust functions
- [ ] The `AGENTS.md` context file is still accurate (update if needed)
